extensionDescription.message: Select and scan a QR code anywhere in the visible browser tab.

riskDisclaimer.message: These signals do not prove the link is malicious. Check the destination before continuing.

notFoundMessage.message: No QR code was found in that area.

resourceLimitMessage.message: That area is too large to scan safely.

imageErrorMessage.message: The screen capture could not be read.

selectionHelp.message: Include the full QR code and a small margin around it. Avoid selecting only part of the code.

displayLimitedNotice.message: … Display limited for safety. Copy preserves the complete value.

riskCredentials.message: The link contains embedded sign-in information.

riskInternationalizedDomain.message: The domain uses an encoded internationalized name that may imitate another site.

riskIpAddress.message: The destination uses an IP address instead of a domain name.

riskLocalNetwork.message: The link points to this device or a private network.

riskUnusualPort.message: The link uses the unusual port $PORT$.

failureRestrictedPage.message: This browser-owned page cannot be scanned. Open the QR code in a regular tab and try again.

failurePermissionExpired.message: Page access expired. Click QR Snip again to retry.

failureCaptureFailed.message: The visible screen could not be captured. Reload the page and try again.

failureInjectionFailed.message: QR Snip could not start on this page. Reload it or open the content in a regular tab.

failureNavigationRace.message: The page changed while QR Snip was starting. Try again on the current page.

failureTabClosed.message: The tab closed before QR Snip could start.

failureExtensionInvalidated.message: QR Snip was updated. Reload the page and try again.

keyboardSelectionHint.message: Arrow keys move · Shift resizes · Alt moves faster · Enter scans

galleryDescription.message: Reusable QR Snip surfaces use strong shape contrast, confident type, and purposeful state color while keeping every interaction calm and legible.

galleryPreview.message: Website · preview only. The destination stays inactive until you choose to open it.
